hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】以下是美联储主席提名人凯文·沃什周二在参议院听证会上的预期内容；【CRYPTO】特朗普延长停火协议，比特币攀升至 78,100 美元，Strategy 斥资 25 亿美元买入；【FINANCE】如果市场剧烈下滑，新的 ETF 策略可能会很脆弱。这就是为什么。

items.title: Here's what to expect from Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh's Senate hearing Tuesday
items.summary: In a much-anticipated hearing before the Banking Committee, the former Fed governor will face questioning over a variety of subjects
items.title_zh: 以下是美联储主席提名人凯文·沃什周二在参议院听证会上的预期内容
items.summary_zh: 在银行委员会备受期待的听证会上，前美联储理事将面临各种问题的质询

items.title: Bitcoin climbs to $78,100 on Trump ceasefire extension, Strategy's $2.5 billion buy
items.summary: Bitcoin traded at $77,541 on Wednesday morning, up 2.2% over 24 hours and 4.3% on the week, after Trump extended the Iran ceasefire and Strategy disclosed its largest BTC purchase in 17 months.
items.title_zh: 特朗普延长停火协议，比特币攀升至 78,100 美元，Strategy 斥资 25 亿美元买入
items.summary_zh: 周三上午，在特朗普延长伊朗停火协议和 Strategy 披露了 17 个月来最大的 BTC 购买量后，比特币交易价格为 77,541 美元，24 小时内上涨 2.2%，本周上涨 4.3%。

items.title: If a violent downturn strikes the market, new ETF strategies may be vulnerable. Here's why
items.summary: Innovation in the exchange-traded fund industry could come at a cost to investors during extreme volatility.
items.title_zh: 如果市场剧烈下滑，新的 ETF 策略可能会很脆弱。这就是为什么
items.summary_zh: 在极端波动期间，交易所交易基金行业的创新可能会让投资者付出代价。

items.title: Two Palestinians Killed in Israeli Shooting Near West Bank School
items.summary: A child was among the dead, according to the Palestinian health ministry. The Israeli military said it had attempted to break up clashes in Al Mughayir, which has seen a surge of Israeli settler violence.
items.title_zh: 两名巴勒斯坦人在约旦河西岸学校附近的以色列枪击事件中丧生
items.summary_zh: 据巴勒斯坦卫生部称，死者中有一名儿童。以色列军方表示，他们试图平息穆加耶尔的冲突，该地区以色列定居者的暴力事件激增。

items.title: Fed pick Warsh backs crypto’s place in finance as Warren raises ‘sock puppet’ concerns in hearing
items.summary: Digital assets are already ingrained in the financial industry, said Federal Reserve chair pick Kevin Warsh during his nomination hearing.
items.title_zh: 沃伦在听证会上提出“傀儡”担忧，美联储提名沃什支持加密货币在金融领域的地位
items.summary_zh: 美联储主席凯文·沃什在提名听证会上表示，数字资产已经在金融行业根深蒂固。

items.title: Bipartisan PACE Act looks to open Fed payment rails to nonbanks, draws crypto support
items.summary: California Reps. Sam Liccardo and Young Kim introduced a bill that would allow certain providers access to the central bank.
items.title_zh: 两党 PACE 法案寻求向非银行机构开放美联储支付渠道，吸引加密货币支持
items.summary_zh: 加州众议员 Sam Liccardo 和 Young Kim 提出了一项法案，允许某些提供商进入中央银行。

items.title: Introducing GPT-Rosalind for life sciences research
items.summary: OpenAI introduces GPT-Rosalind, a frontier reasoning model built to accelerate drug discovery, genomics analysis, protein reasoning, and scientific research workflows.
items.title_zh: 引入 GPT-Rosalind 用于生命科学研究
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出了 GPT-Rosalind，这是一种前沿推理模型，旨在加速药物发现、基因组分析、蛋白质推理和科学研究工作流程。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Extends Cease-Fire With Iran
items.summary: The pause in hostilities had been set to expire within hours. The president said Pakistan, which is trying to mediate an end to the war, requested he hold off any attacks.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普延长与伊朗的停火期限
items.summary_zh: 敌对行动的暂停预计将在数小时内结束。总统表示，正在努力调解结束战争的巴基斯坦要求他停止任何袭击。

items.title: Prediction markets are the new secret weapon for Coinbase and Robinhood growth
items.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald analysts said the market is treating recent trading slumps as old news, shifting focus instead toward prediction markets and new product launches to drive the next leg of growth for Coinbase and Robinhood.
items.title_zh: 预测市场是 Coinbase 和 Robinhood 增长的新秘密武器
items.summary_zh: Cantor Fitzgerald 分析师表示，市场将最近的交易暴跌视为旧闻，将焦点转向预测市场和新产品发布，以推动 Coinbase 和 Robinhood 的下一阶段增长。

items.title: Etherealize updates long-term ETH price prediction to $250,000
items.summary: ETH would trade above $250,000 if Ethereum can capture the same monetary premium as bitcoin and gold carry as stores-of-value.
items.title_zh: Etherealize 将长期 ETH 价格预测更新至 250,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 如果以太坊能够获得与比特币和黄金作为价值储存手段相同的货币溢价，那么 ETH 的交易价格将超过 25 万美元。

items.title: Scaling Codex to enterprises worldwide
items.summary: OpenAI launches Codex Labs, partners with with Accenture, PwC, Infosys, and others to help enterprises deploy and scale Codex across the software development lifecycle, and hits 4M Codex WAU.
items.title_zh: 将 Codex 扩展到全球企业
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 Codex 实验室，与 Accenture、PwC、Infosys 等合作，帮助企业在整个软件开发生命周期中部署和扩展 Codex，并达到 4M Codex WAU。

items.title: Codex for (almost) everything
items.summary: The updated Codex app for macOS and Windows adds computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins to accelerate developer workflows.
items.title_zh: （几乎）所有内容的法典
items.summary_zh: 适用于 macOS 和 Windows 的更新后的 Codex 应用程序增加了计算机使用、应用程序内浏览、图像生成、内存和插件，以加速开发人员工作流程。

items.title: Research with ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to research with ChatGPT using search and deep research to find up-to-date information, analyze sources, and generate structured insights.
items.title_zh: 使用 ChatGPT 进行研究
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 进行研究，使用搜索和深入研究来查找最新信息、分析来源并生成结构化见解。

items.title: Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire named Edgerton Award winners
items.summary: The associate professors of EECS and chemistry, respectively, are honored for exceptional contributions to teaching, research, and service at MIT.
items.title_zh: 雅各布·安德烈亚斯和布雷特·麦奎尔被评为埃哲顿奖获得者
items.summary_zh: EECS 和化学副教授分别因对麻省理工学院的教学、研究和服务做出的杰出贡献而受到表彰。

items.title: Human-machine teaming dives underwater
items.summary: Researchers are developing hardware and algorithms to improve collaboration between divers and autonomous underwater vehicles engaged in maritime missions.
items.title_zh: 人机协作潜入水下
items.summary_zh: 研究人员正在开发硬件和算法，以改善潜水员和执行海上任务的自主水下航行器之间的协作。

items.title: Helping data centers deliver higher performance with less hardware
items.summary: Researchers developed a system that intelligently balances workloads to improve the efficiency of flash storage hardware in a data center.
items.title_zh: 帮助数据中心以更少的硬件提供更高的性能
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种智能平衡工作负载的系统，以提高数据中心闪存存储硬件的效率。

items.title: Trump administration discussing currency swap line with United Arab Emirates
items.summary: Such a move would provide liquidity in dollars to the oil-rich UAE, but could be politically tenuous for the administration amid higher prices at home.
items.title_zh: 特朗普政府与阿拉伯联合酋长国讨论货币互换额度
items.summary_zh: 此举将为石油资源丰富的阿联酋提供美元流动性，但由于国内油价上涨，对政府来说可能在政治上脆弱。

items.title: JPMorgan expands $1.5 trillion economic security splurge into Europe
items.summary: The banking giant is looking to invest in areas deemed critical to economic security, including defense and AI.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通将 1.5 万亿美元的经济安全投资扩大到欧洲
items.summary_zh: 这家银行巨头正在寻求投资对经济安全至关重要的领域，包括国防和人工智能。

items.title: Software stock dogs have joined market rally. There's a classic investing lesson in the rebound
items.summary: In a 2026 market that had Microsoft down close to 20%, looking for opportunities to buy after big drawdowns is coming to more tech and software stocks.
items.title_zh: 软件股也加入了市场上涨行列。反弹中有一个经典的投资教训
items.summary_zh: 在 2026 年的市场中，微软股价下跌了近 20%，更多科技和软件股票在大幅下跌后寻找买入机会。

items.title: Retail traders pile into Allbirds after odd AI pivot. History shows it won't end well
items.summary: This surge of speculative buying reflects a broader return of animal spirits among small traders.
items.title_zh: 在奇怪的人工智能转向之后，零售交易员纷纷涌入 Allbirds。历史表明结局不会好
items.summary_zh: 投机性买盘的激增反映出小贸易商的动物精神更广泛地回归。

items.title: Trump buys time for Iran deal after frantic day of diplomacy
items.summary: The US president's decision marked the second time in as many weeks he has backed off a threat to escalate the war, buying more time
items.title_zh: 经过一天的疯狂外交后，特朗普为伊朗协议争取了时间
items.summary_zh: 美国总统的决定标志着他在几周内第二次放弃了升级战争的威胁，从而赢得了更多时间

items.title: Iran sees mass redundancies from war with US and Israel
items.summary: The impact is being felt by manufacturers, retailers and the digital sector, amid warnings it could get worse if the war resumes.
items.title_zh: 伊朗因与美国和以色列的战争而大规模裁员
items.summary_zh: 制造商、零售商和数字行业都感受到了这种影响，并警告称，如果战争重新爆发，情况可能会变得更糟。

items.title: Israeli soldiers punished over vandalism of Jesus statue in Lebanon
items.summary: Two soldiers will be removed from combat duty and receive 30 days of military detention, Israel's military says.
items.title_zh: 以色列士兵因在黎巴嫩破坏耶稣雕像而受到惩罚
items.summary_zh: 以色列军方表示，两名士兵将被解除战斗职责并接受 30 天的军事拘留。

items.title: How the Cole Disaster Drove the U.S. to Develop New Warship Defenses
items.summary: The Navy destroyers enforcing a blockade of Iranian ports carry weapons fielded after an American warship was attacked and nearly sunk more than 25 years ago.
items.title_zh: 科尔灾难如何促使美国开发新的军舰防御系统
items.summary_zh: 执行封锁伊朗港口的海军驱逐舰携带了25年前一艘美国军舰遭到袭击并险些沉没后部署的武器。

items.title: Trump Is Said to Be in Talks to Send Afghans Who Aided U.S. Forces to Congo
items.summary: A U.S. aid worker said that the Afghans, who were evacuated to Qatar, would face a choice between moving to the Democratic Republic of Congo and living under the Taliban.
items.title_zh: 据说特朗普正在商谈将援助美军的阿富汗人派遣到刚果
items.summary_zh: 一名美国援助人员表示，撤离到卡塔尔的阿富汗人将面临一个选择：要么搬到刚果民主共和国，要么生活在塔利班统治下。

items.title: Israeli Soldiers Sentenced to Jail for Damaging Jesus Statue in Lebanon
items.summary: A statue of the crucifixion of Christ has been replaced after one soldier photographed another swinging what looked like a sledgehammer at its head.
items.title_zh: 以色列士兵因在黎巴嫩破坏耶稣雕像而被判入狱
items.summary_zh: 一名士兵拍摄到另一名士兵在其头部挥舞着看起来像大锤的东西后，一座基督受难雕像被更换。

items.title: Core Scientific seeks $3.3 billion bond sale to further AI data center pivot
items.summary: The company is building six AI data centers, leased to CoreWeave for 12 years, and is expected to generate approximately $10 billion in revenue.
items.title_zh: Core Scientific寻求发行33亿美元债券以进一步推动人工智能数据中心转型
items.summary_zh: 该公司正在建设六个人工智能数据中心，租给CoreWeave 12年，预计将产生约100亿美元的收入。

items.title: Kelp DAO exploiter launders $80 million worth of ETH, mostly through THORChain: onchain analyst
items.summary: The 24-hour swap volume on THORChain surged to $394 million, significantly exceeding usual daily volumes of under $35 million.

items.title: Using projects in ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to use projects in ChatGPT to organize chats, files, and instructions, manage ongoing work, and collaborate more effectively.

items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 中的项目来组织聊天、文件和说明、管理正在进行的工作以及更有效地协作。

items.title: 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
items.summary: Three new agentic safety and policy features integrated into Ads Advisor will help protect and streamline your Google Ads account.
items.title_zh: Ads Advisor 让 Google Ads 更安全、更快速的 3 种新方法
items.summary_zh: Ads Advisor 中集成的三项新的代理安全和政策功能将有助于保护和简化您的 Google Ads 帐户。

items.title: New ways to create personalized images in the Gemini app
items.summary: Nano Banana 2 now uses your personal context and Google Photos to create images that reflect your unique life.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini 应用程序中创建个性化图像的新方法
items.summary_zh: Nano Banana 2 现在使用您的个人背景和 Google Photos 来创建反映您独特生活的图像。

items.title: Bringing AI-driven protein-design tools to biologists everywhere
items.summary: Founded by Tristan Bepler PhD ’20 and former MIT professor Tim Lu PhD ’07, OpenProtein.AI offers researchers open-source models and other tools for protein engineering.
items.title_zh: 为世界各地的生物学家带来人工智能驱动的蛋白质设计工具
items.summary_zh: OpenProtein.AI 由 Tristan Bepler 博士 '20 和前麻省理工学院教授 Tim Lu 博士 '07 创立，为研究人员提供开源模型和其他蛋白质工程工具。

items.title: New technique makes AI models leaner and faster while they’re still learning
items.summary: Researchers use control theory to shed unnecessary complexity from AI models during training, cutting compute costs without sacrificing performance.
items.title_zh: 新技术使人工智能模型在学习过程中变得更精简、更快
items.summary_zh: 研究人员利用控制理论在训练过程中消除人工智能模型不必要的复杂性，从而在不牺牲性能的情况下降低计算成本。

items.title: Phone tracking shows how Colombian mercenaries backed Sudan's RSF - report
items.summary: The Conflict Insights Group (CIG) says its research also shows the extent of UAE involvement.

items.title: Bitcoin's 'Coinbase premium' just posted its longest bullish streak since October's record high of $126,000
items.summary: Bitcoin's Coinbase premium has been positive for 14 straight days, the longest bullish streak since BTC hit its all time high of $126,000 in October.
items.title_zh: 比特币的“Coinbase溢价”刚刚创下自10月份创纪录高点126,000美元以来最长的看涨趋势
items.summary_zh: 比特币的 Coinbase 溢价已连续 14 天为正值，这是自 10 月份 BTC 触及历史高点 126,000 美元以来最长的看涨趋势。

items.title: Inside the hunt for Satoshi: Filmmakers chase crypto’s biggest mystery
items.summary: A new documentary digs into Bitcoin’s origins, reframing the search for Satoshi Nakamoto as both a technical investigation and a deeply human story.
items.title_zh: 寻找中本聪的过程：电影制片人追寻加密货币最大的谜团
items.summary_zh: 一部新纪录片深入探讨了比特币的起源，将寻找中本聪的过程重新定义为一项技术调查和一个深刻的人性故事。

items.title: Peter Thiel-backed unicorn Ramp rolls out $0 conversions between USDT and dollars across product suite
items.summary: The fintech provider has rolled out support for Ethereum, Solana and Plasma-issued USDT tokens across its entire product suite.
items.title_zh: Peter Thiel 支持的独角兽 Ramp 在整个产品套件中推出 USDT 与美元之间的 0 美元兑换
items.summary_zh: 这家金融科技提供商已在其整个产品套件中推出了对以太坊、Solana 和 Plasma 发行的 USDT 代币的支持。

items.title: A philosophy of work
items.summary: As the NC Ethics of Technology Postdoctoral Fellow, Michal Masny is advancing dialogue, teaching, and research into the social and ethical dimensions of new computing technologies.

items.title: Evaluating the ethics of autonomous systems
items.summary: MIT researchers developed a testing framework that pinpoints situations where AI decision-support systems are not treating people and communities fairly.

items.title: Volkswagen announces voice AI in its Chinese cars from later this year
items.summary: Volkswagen revealed four cars, including the ID. UNYX 09, which the company said it co-developed with EV maker Xpeng in two years.
items.title_zh: 大众汽车宣布今年晚些时候将在其中国汽车中配备语音人工智能
items.summary_zh: 大众汽车发布了四款汽车，其中包括 ID. UNYX 09，该公司表示，该产品是与电动汽车制造商小鹏汽车在两年内共同开发的。

items.title: AST SpaceMobile shares drop after its satellite is placed in wrong orbit by Bezos' Blue Origin
items.summary: Blue Origin acknowledged the satellite was placed in the wrong orbit, but has not commented since it was deemed lost.
items.title_zh: 贝佐斯的蓝色起源将 AST SpaceMobile 的卫星送入错误轨道后，其股价下跌
items.summary_zh: 蓝色起源承认这颗卫星被放置在错误的轨道上，但由于被认为丢失而没有发表评论。

items.title: AI startup Cursor in talks to raise $2 billion funding round at valuation of over $50 billion
items.summary: Artificial intelligence startup Cursor in talks to raise a $2 billion fundraising round at an over $50 billion valuation, which does not include the investment.
items.title_zh: AI初创公司Cursor正在洽谈融资20亿美元，估值超过500亿美元
items.summary_zh: 人工智能初创公司 Cursor 正在洽谈一轮 20 亿美元融资，估值超过 500 亿美元，其中不包括投资。

items.title: Here are 3 forces that drove a remarkable, record-setting week on Wall Street
items.summary: The S&P 500 closed above 7,100 for the first time as it completed its fastest turnaround since 1990.
items.title_zh: 以下三股力量推动了华尔街创下非凡创纪录的一周
items.summary_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数首次收于 7,100 点之上，完成了 1990 年以来最快的反转。

items.title: Virginia approves redistricting, giving Democrats edge in midterms
items.summary: The new maps in Virginia could make it easier for Democrats to take control of the US House of Representatives in November.
items.title_zh: 弗吉尼亚州批准重新划分选区，使民主党在中期选举中占据优势
items.summary_zh: 弗吉尼亚州的新地图可能会让民主党在 11 月更容易控制美国众议院。

items.title: Domestic workers legally recognised in Indonesia after '22-year struggle'
items.summary: The country is home to some 4.2 million domestic workers - of which almost 90% are women.
items.title_zh: 经过“22年的斗争”，印尼家庭佣工获得法律承认
items.summary_zh: 该国拥有约 420 万家庭佣工，其中近 90% 是女性。

items.title: Zelensky says failure of US envoys to visit Kyiv is 'disrespectful'
items.summary: US envoy Steve Witkoff and Donald Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner have travelled to Moscow several times, but never to Kyiv.
items.title_zh: 泽连斯基表示美国特使未能访问基辅是“不尊重”
items.summary_zh: 美国特使史蒂夫·威特科夫和唐纳德·特朗普的女婿贾里德·库什纳曾多次前往莫斯科，但从未去过基辅。

items.title: Unprecedented ruling finds Hungary's anti-LGBTQ laws in breach of EU values
items.summary: The EU's top court finds that the reforms breached EU values on a number of levels and broke the founding values of the EU treaty.
items.title_zh: 史无前例的裁决发现匈牙利的反 LGBTQ 法律违反了欧盟价值观
items.summary_zh: 欧盟最高法院认为，这些改革在多个层面上违反了欧盟价值观，并违反了欧盟条约的基本价值观。

items.title: Mass trial for 486 alleged gang members begins in El Salvador
items.summary: Footage released by the attorney general's office shows large groups of men in prison attending the trial via video link.
items.title_zh: 萨尔瓦多开始对 486 名被指控的团伙成员进行大规模审判
items.summary_zh: 总检察长办公室发布的视频显示，监狱中的大批男子通过视频链接参加审判。

items.title: Japan loosens arms export rules in break from post-WW2 pacifism
items.summary: This clears the way for Japan to sell weapons to more than a dozen countries.
items.title_zh: 日本放宽武器出口规则，打破二战后和平主义
items.summary_zh: 这为日本向十多个国家出售武器扫清了道路。

items.title: Fired U.K. Official Describes ‘Pressure’ to Expedite Envoy’s Appointment
items.summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s office wanted Peter Mandelson, a Jeffrey Epstein associate, swiftly installed as ambassador to Washington, the official said.
items.title_zh: 被解雇的英国官员描述了加快任命特使的“压力”
items.summary_zh: 这位官员表示，总理基尔·斯塔默的办公室希望杰弗里·爱泼斯坦的助手彼得·曼德尔森迅速任命为驻华盛顿大使。

items.title: U.S. Turns Up Pressure on Iraq to Distance Itself From Iran
items.summary: Washington is demanding that the Baghdad government dismantle Iran-backed Iraqi militias that have been attacking Americans and U.S. sites there recently.
items.title_zh: 美国加大对伊拉克施压，要求其与伊朗保持距离
items.summary_zh: 华盛顿要求巴格达政府解散伊朗支持的伊拉克民兵组织，这些组织最近一直在袭击美国人和美国驻地。

items.title: 2 Americans Killed in Mexico Crash Were C.I.A. Members
items.summary: The two Americans were killed on Sunday when their vehicle crashed while returning from a counter-cartel operation led by Mexico’s armed forces in the state of Chihuahua.
items.title_zh: 墨西哥空难中丧生的 2 名美国人是中情局成员会员
items.summary_zh: 周日，这两名美国人在从墨西哥武装部队在奇瓦瓦州领导的反卡特尔行动返回途中发生车祸，不幸身亡。

items.title: Teotihuacán Pyramids Shooting: Gunman Carried Notes on U.S. Mass Shootings
items.summary: The man who killed one tourist at a Mexican pyramid and wounded several others had materials in his backpack tied to a 1999 U.S. attack, a possible reference to the Columbine High School massacre.
items.title_zh: 特奥蒂瓦坎金字塔枪击事件：枪手携带有关美国大规模枪击事件的笔记
items.summary_zh: 在墨西哥金字塔杀死一名游客并打伤数人的男子的背包里藏有与 1999 年美国袭击事件有关的材料，这可能与哥伦拜恩高中大屠杀有关。

items.title: London Tube Drivers’ Strike Halts a Key Line
items.summary: The dispute over working conditions and hours was expected to cause widespread delays and service outages.
items.title_zh: 伦敦地铁司机罢工导致一条关键线路停运
items.summary_zh: 关于工作条件和工作时间的争议预计将导致大范围的延误和服务中断。

items.title: Tron's Justin Sun sues Trump-linked World Liberty Financial over frozen assets
items.summary: World Liberty unfairly froze Sun's $WLFI tokens and threatened him, the lawsuit alleged.
items.title_zh: Tron 的孙宇晨起诉与特朗普有关的世界自由金融公司冻结资产
items.summary_zh: 诉讼称，World Liberty 不公平地冻结了 Sun 的 $WLFI 代币并威胁他。

items.title: Chinese crypto mogul Li Lin’s private trading arm is set to move into a Hong Kong-listed wealth firm
items.summary: The transfer effectively moves part of Li’s private trading operation into a public company where he is the largest shareholder.
items.title_zh: 中国加密货币大亨李林的私人交易部门将迁入一家在香港上市的财富公司
items.summary_zh: 这次转让实际上将李的私人交易业务的一部分转移到了一家上市公司，他是该公司的最大股东。

items.title: Crypto's great hope in Senate's Clarity Act still has a path to survive tight calendar
items.summary: A sideshow stablecoin yield debate has dragged the market structure bill through months of delay, even as the Senate's available floor time diminishes for 2026.
items.title_zh: 加密货币在参议院的《澄清法案》中寄予厚望，但仍能在紧张的日程中生存下来
items.summary_zh: 尽管参议院 2026 年的可用发言时间有所减少，但围绕稳定币收益率的辩论已将市场结构法案拖了数月的时间。

items.title: New York sues Coinbase, Gemini over prediction market offerings
items.summary: New York has become the latest state to argue that prediction market contracts touching on sports and entertainment violate state gambling laws.
items.title_zh: 纽约就预测市场产品起诉 Coinbase 和 Gemini
items.summary_zh: 纽约州成为最新一个认为涉及体育和娱乐的预测市场合同违反州赌博法的州。

items.title: Mob boss John Gotti’s grandson is headed to prison for a $1.1 million Covid fraud and crypto scheme
items.summary: he mob boss’ grandson defrauded the U.S. government’s Covid-19 relief system out of $1.1 million and invested at least half of it to invest in crypto businesses.
items.title_zh: 黑帮老大 John Gotti 的孙子因 110 万美元的 Covid 欺诈和加密计划而入狱
items.summary_zh: 黑帮老大的孙子从美国政府的 Covid-19 救济系统中骗取了 110 万美元，并将其中至少一半投资于加密货币业务。

items.title: Justin Sun sues World Liberty Financial over WLFI token freeze, governance exclusion
items.summary: Sun said the WLFI team refused to unfreeze his tokens, leaving him with no choice but to turn to the courts.
items.title_zh: 孙宇晨就 WLFI 代币冻结、治理排除起诉 World Liberty Financial
items.summary_zh: Sun表示，WLFI团队拒绝解冻他的代币，让他别无选择，只能向法院求助。

items.title: Sui-based Volo Protocol exploited; team pledges to absorb losses
items.summary: Sui-based liquid staking platform Volo reported that it was exploited for roughly $3.5 million from its WBTC, XAUm, and USDC vaults.
items.title_zh: 基于 Sui 的 Volo 协议被利用；团队承诺承担损失
items.summary_zh: 总部位于隋的流动质押平台 Volo 报告称，其 WBTC、XAUm 和 USDC 金库被盗取了约 350 万美元。

items.title: SoFi adds XRP deposits but users criticize lack of external wallet transfers
items.summary: According to SoFi's support page, the crypto platform does not permit XR transfers to outside wallets.
items.title_zh: SoFi 增加 XRP 存款但用户批评缺乏外部钱包转账
items.summary_zh: 根据 SoFi 的支持页面，该加密平台不允许 XR 转账到外部钱包。

items.title: Kalshi eyes crypto expansion with perpetual futures trading: report
items.summary: Both Coinbase and Binance are offering users access to prediction markets as interest in wagering on the outcomes of different events swells.
items.title_zh: Kalshi 着眼于通过永续期货交易扩展加密货币：报告
items.summary_zh: 随着对不同事件结果下注的兴趣不断增加，Coinbase 和 Binance 都为用户提供了进入预测市场的机会。

items.title: New York Attorney General sues Coinbase, Gemini for ‘illegal gambling’ on prediction market platforms
items.summary: NY AG Letitia James has sued Coinbase and Gemini for allegedly illegally offering people the ability to bet on events.
items.title_zh: 纽约总检察长起诉 Coinbase、Gemini 在预测市场平台上“非法赌博”
items.summary_zh: 纽约州检察长 Letitia James 起诉 Coinbase 和 Gemini 涉嫌非法向人们提供对赛事进行投注的能力。

items.title: OpenAI helps Hyatt advance AI among colleagues
items.summary: Hyatt deploys ChatGPT Enterprise across its global workforce, using GPT-5.4 and Codex to improve productivity, operations, and guest experiences.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 帮助凯悦在同事中推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 凯悦在其全球员工中部署 ChatGPT Enterprise，使用 GPT-5.4 和 Codex 来提高生产力、运营和宾客体验。

items.title: Accelerating the cyber defense ecosystem that protects us all
items.summary: Leading security firms and enterprises join OpenAI’s Trusted Access for Cyber, using GPT-5.4-Cyber and $10M in API grants to strengthen global cyber defense.
items.title_zh: 加速保护我们所有人的网络防御生态系统
items.summary_zh: 领先的安全公司和企业加入 OpenAI 的网络可信访问，利用 GPT-5.4-Cyber​​ 和 1000 万美元的 API 拨款来加强全球网络防御。

items.title: Trusted access for the next era of cyber defense
items.summary: OpenAI expands its Trusted Access for Cyber program, introducing GPT-5.4-Cyber to vetted defenders and strengthening safeguards as AI cybersecurity capabilities advance.
items.title_zh: 下一个网络防御时代的可信访问
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 扩展了其可信网络访问计划，向经过审查的防御者引入 GPT-5.4-Cyber​​，并随着 AI 网络安全能力的进步而加强保障措施。

items.title: Enterprises power agentic workflows in Cloudflare Agent Cloud with OpenAI
items.summary: Cloudflare brings OpenAI’s GPT-5.4 and Codex to Agent Cloud, enabling enterprises to build, deploy, and scale AI agents for real-world tasks with speed and security.
items.title_zh: 企业通过 OpenAI 为 Cloudflare Agent Cloud 中的代理工作流程提供支持
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 将 OpenAI 的 GPT-5.4 和 Codex 引入 Agent Cloud，使企业能够快速、安全地构建、部署和扩展用于实际任务的 AI 代理。

items.title: QIMMA قِمّة ⛰: A Quality-First Arabic LLM Leaderboard
items.title_zh: QIMMA قِّבÉ ⛰：质量第一的阿拉伯语 LLM 排行榜

items.title: How to Ground a Korean AI Agent in Real Demographics with Synthetic Personas
items.title_zh: 如何使用合成人物角色让韩国人工智能代理融入真实人口统计数据

items.title: AI and the Future of Cybersecurity: Why Openness Matters
items.title_zh: 人工智能和网络安全的未来：为什么开放性很重要

items.title: Ecom-RLVE: Adaptive Verifiable Environments for E-Commerce Conversational Agents
items.title_zh: Ecom-RLVE：电子商务会话代理的自适应可验证环境

items.title: The PR you would have opened yourself
items.title_zh: 你自己开的 PR

items.title: Inside VAKRA: Reasoning, Tool Use, and Failure Modes of Agents
items.title_zh: VAKRA 内部：代理的推理、工具使用和故障模式

items.title: Meet HoloTab by HCompany. Your AI browser companion.
items.title_zh: 了解 HCompany 的 HoloTab。您的人工智能浏览器伴侣。

items.title: Waypoint-1.5: Higher-Fidelity Interactive Worlds for Everyday GPUs
items.title_zh: Waypoint-1.5：适用于日常 GPU 的更高保真度交互世界

items.title: 7 ways to travel smarter this summer, with help from Google
items.summary: The latest tools from Google can help you plan trips, find a great deal and explore your next destination.
items.title_zh: 在 Google 的帮助下，今年夏天智能出行的 7 种方式
items.summary_zh: Google 的最新工具可以帮助您计划旅行、找到超值优惠并探索下一个目的地。

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS is now available across Google products.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS：下一代富有表现力的人工智能语音
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools in Chrome
items.summary: Skills in Chrome let you discover, save and remix AI workflows — and repeat them instantly.
items.title_zh: 将您最好的 AI 提示变成 Chrome 中的一键式工具
items.summary_zh: Chrome 中的技能可让您发现、保存和重新混合 AI 工作流程 - 并立即重复它们。

items.title: Bringing people together at AI for the Economy Forum
items.summary: Google is bringing people together in Washington D.C. at our AI for the Economy Forum.
items.title_zh: 人工智能经济论坛将人们聚集在一起
items.summary_zh: 谷歌将人们聚集在华盛顿特区，参加我们的人工智能经济论坛。

items.title: New ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API
items.summary: Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority, to balance cost and latency.
items.title_zh: Gemini API 中平衡成本和可靠性的新方法
items.summary_zh: Google 正在为 Gemini API 引入两个新的推理层：Flex 和 Priority，以平衡成本和延迟。

items.title: Create, edit and share videos at no cost in Google Vids
items.summary: New AI capabilities are coming to Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1, like high-quality video generation at no cost and more.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Vids 中免费创建、编辑和分享视频
items.summary_zh: 由 Lyria 3 和 Veo 3.1 提供支持的 Google Vids 即将推出新的 AI 功能，例如免费生成高质量视频等。

items.title: We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.
items.summary: Google partnered with the Brazilian government on a satellite imagery map to help protect the country’s forests.
items.title_zh: 我们正在创建新的卫星图像地图，以帮助保护巴西的森林。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌与巴西政府合作开发卫星图像地图，以帮助保护该国的森林。

items.title: Q&A: MIT SHASS and the future of education in the age of AI
items.summary: As the School of Humanities, Arts, and Social Sciences marks 75 years, Dean Agustín Rayo reflects on how AI is reshaping higher education and why SHASS disciplines continue to be central to MIT’s mission.
items.title_zh: 问答：MIT SHASS 和人工智能时代教育的未来
items.summary_zh: 在人文、艺术和社会科学学院成立 75 周年之际，院长 Agustín Rayo 反思了人工智能如何重塑高等教育，以及为什么 SHASS 学科仍然是麻省理工学院使命的核心。

items.title: Sixteen new START.nano companies are developing hard-tech solutions with the support of MIT.nano
items.summary: Startup accelerator program grows to over 30 companies, almost half of them with MIT pedigrees.
items.title_zh: 十六家新的 START.nano 公司正在 MIT.nano 的支持下开发硬技术解决方案
items.summary_zh: 创业加速器计划已发展到超过 30 家公司，其中几乎一半拥有 MIT 出身。

items.title: Working to advance the nuclear renaissance
items.summary: Dean Price, assistant professor in the Department of Nuclear Science and Engineering, sees a bright future for nuclear power, and believes AI can help us realize that vision.
items.title_zh: 致力于推进核复兴
items.summary_zh: 核科学与工程系助理教授 Dean Price 看到了核电的光明前景，并相信人工智能可以帮助我们实现这一愿景。
